name: devops-mern-stack
description: Full-stack MERN application with Docker support

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: npm --prefix server run dev & npm --prefix client run dev
scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix client run lint:fix && npm --prefix server run lint:fix
scripts.format: npm --prefix client run format && npm --prefix server run format

author: Your Name
